input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.1.1
            TITLE: dynamic events and maximum scores

            CONTENT:
            rule D.1.1: Dynamic Events and Maximum Scores
D.1.1 Dynamic Events and Maximum Scores 
Acceleration  100 points 
Skid Pad    75 points 
Autocross  125 points 
Efficiency  100 points 
Endurance  275 points 
Total       675 points

final_answer: rule D.1.1: Dynamic Events and Maximum Scores D.1.1 Dynamic Events and Maximum Scores Acceleration 100 points Skid Pad 75 points Autocross 125 points Efficiency 100 points Endurance 275 points Total 675 points
